assessor_1_raw:
## Assessment 1 (Run 2): Lab Turnaround

AUC-TD single horizon vs. C-index for survival model. Fixed LR baseline vs. tuned Cox. Both documented. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Assessment 2 (Run 2): Lab Turnaround

Concrete flaws: AUC-TD primary metric undervalues full trajectory; tuning asymmetry confounds comparison. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Assessment 3 (Run 2): Lab Turnaround

C-index should be primary; LR baseline requires tuning. Both are concrete design errors for a survival model comparison. Verdict: critique_wins
adjudication_raw: ## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 2): Unanimous critique_wins. Verdict: critique_wins
